title: Product Classification based on Features
scenario: Design a prompt to classify a set of products into three categories: high-end, mid-range, and budget. The classification should be based on specific product features such as price, brand, and material. Assume the products are in JSON format and contain a mix of standard and custom attributes. The target LLM output should be a JSON object with the classified products at each category.
constraints: Must use a JSON-based classification library such as jsonschema
Must handle cases where a product belongs to multiple categories

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify the accuracy of the classification results using a testing dataset
Check if the prompt satisfies the constraints provided
Assess the clarity and conciseness of the prompt's explanation
